feed.description: Recurring guests from other shows revisit their positions.
feed.title: Cross-Show

bullets: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about macroeconomics, and I'm joined by Skanda Amarnauth, returning macro economist. Skanda Amarnauth, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Dr. Elena Fisher was on last week revisiting her 2024 position.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about macroeconomics, and I'm joined by Skanda Amarnauth, returning macro economist. Skanda Amarnauth, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Macro Without the Theatrics
